sources.label: StockTitan AVT news feed (latest headlines; nothing material post-Jun 6)
GuruFocus: AVT up 6.8% (Jun 2) but ~50% above GF Value
Seeking Alpha: Avnet - Thesis Played Out, Now Fully Valued (rating downgrade)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's up-move was a rank reconciliation (displayed 82 vs adjusted 68) that has now landed at 67; no material news since Jun 6 and today's -1.6% is drift, so hold with a small negative delta for post-rerating alpha decay after a +74% YTD run and sell-side capitulation upgrades (BofA to Neutral, PT $96, Jun 2).
verdicts.bull: Cycle indicators are turning (extended backlog, book-to-bill recovery, inventory correction over per BofA), and broad distribution gives cheap, lagging exposure to the AI component pull-through with 13 years of dividend growth.
verdicts.neutral: At ~$86 after a 74% YTD rerating and a wave of price-target catch-ups (Raymond James $95, Truist $95), the easy mean-reversion alpha is harvested; the name now trades on cycle delivery rather than mispricing.
verdicts.bear: GF Value pegs shares ~50% above fair value and Seeking Alpha flags the thesis as played out; distribution carries thin margins and low strategic uniqueness, so any AI-demand air pocket or inventory re-stuffing hits a no-longer-cheap stock hard.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q4 FY2026 earnings/guidance confirming the distribution cycle upturn (book-to-bill, backlog) and AI-adjacent design-win traction.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating crowding: consensus has now chased the move, leaving downside if component demand or AI pull-through disappoints.
